descriptor: 22STRONG Foundation helps donors fund recovery care for veterans and low-income youth when cost, coverage, timing, or access threatens the next appointment.
address: 4120 Birch St, Suite 106, Newport Beach, CA 92660

monthly.22: $22 a month anchors the Strong Circle and helps 22STRONG say yes before a recovery plan stops.
monthly.50: $50 a month creates steady room for follow-through appointments when coverage or cash runs short.
monthly.100: $100 a month helps keep multiple recovery plans moving across the year.
monthly.140: $140 a month funds a full recovery session every month for someone who can't cover it.
monthly.default: Monthly gifts help the Strong Circle keep care moving before a coverage lapse turns into a stopped plan.

oneTime.50: $50 helps move the next appointment within reach.
oneTime.100: $100 helps offset a hands-on recovery session for someone whose plan is at risk.
oneTime.140: $140 funds one recovery session for someone who can't cover it.
oneTime.980: $980 sponsors a full recovery plan — all seven sessions.
oneTime.default: Your one-time gift helps turn a stalled recovery plan into real appointments.
